title: React application entry point with routing configuration
purpose: Serves as the main entry file for the Mermaid Collaboration UI, responsible for rendering the React application and setting up navigation routes.
module_context: Initializes the React DOM root element and configures routing between different application sections including onboarding, pseudo viewer, and main collaboration app.

steps.content: Locate the DOM element with ID 'root' for React rendering.
IF the root element is not found, throw an error indicating missing DOM element.
Create a React root container using the found DOM element.
Render the application tree with StrictMode, BrowserRouter, and configured routes.
Set up routing for onboarding sections including dashboard, topic details, search, welcome, graph, and team views.
Configure routing for the pseudo viewer section with wildcard path.
Define the main application route as a catch-all for any unmatched paths.
